name: WANDERING SPLEEN
definition: ABERRANT / FLOATING / PTOTIC / DRIFTING / DYSTOPIC / DISPLACED / PROLAPSED SPLEEN excessively mobile spleen on an elongated pedicle displaced from its usual position in LUQ

demographics.Age: any (higher frequency in women of childbearing age)

distribution: empty splenic fossa + associated soft-tissue mass in center of abdomen / pelvis
discriminating_features: empty splenic fossa + associated soft-tissue mass in center of abdomen / pelvis
displaced large spleen ← congestion during torsion

general: empty splenic fossa + associated soft-tissue mass in center of abdomen / pelvis
displaced large spleen ← congestion during torsion
abnormal ovoid / round contour of spleen
whorled appearance of twisted splenic pedicle
US: NO flow within spleen on Doppler US
elevated resistive index in proximal splenic artery
